title: White Glitter Frame 5.5" x 3.5" - First Family Christmas
description: Give a treasured festive photo a precious home with this white glitter 'First Family Christmas' photo frame with 5.5" x 3.5" aperture. From the Step into the Forest Collection: your magical pathway to a winter wonderland at home. This delightful frame features matt white construction with a white glitter mount and silver mirrored titling. Perfect for the first photo of a new family together at Christmas. Complete with a standing strut and wall hanging hook, this makes the perfect gift.
